mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_articles (user_id, title, summary, content, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, summary, content, status, created_at, updated_at FROM knowledge_articles WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
